plan.title: docs: record #1595 PR 1 codebase MAP source-of-truth decision

narratives.Description: PR 1 for #1595 records the #958 disposition and source-of-truth decision for codebase MAP projections.
narratives.Origin: Derived from https://github.com/deftai/directive/issues/1595, limited to the PR 1 decision-record slice.
narratives.Overview:
## Summary

This PR documents the accepted reframe of #958 for the #1595 rollout: durable codebase-structure metadata belongs in vBRIEF-owned architecture metadata, while the codebase MAP and any optional file headers are generated projections.

The slice is intentionally documentation-only. It does not add schema, validators, extraction, MAP rendering, generated headers, task gates, or consumer AGENTS/template propagation.

## Scope

- Record that #958 is superseded as an implementation plan while preserving its orientation goal.
- Record that the MAP is the primary deliverable.
- Record that headers are optional generated projections only.
- Record that canonical metadata belongs in vBRIEF / PROJECT-DEFINITION, with an x-directive fallback only if needed.
- Record that glossary semantics stay with the existing glossary path.

## Next

PR 2 should define the first concrete codeStructure shape and validation behavior.

items.title: #958 is documented as superseded for implementation while preserving the orientation goal.
The codebase MAP is documented as the primary projection deliverable.
Source file headers are documented as optional generated projections only.
vBRIEF-owned architecture metadata is documented as the canonical metadata home.
Glossary and comment semantics are documented as out of scope for this path.

references.title: Issue #1595: feat(codebase): generate codebase MAP from vBRIEF-owned codeStructure metadata
